subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of Abdullah in this sacred and exalted Tablet, that he may find solace therein throughout his days and recite it morn and eventide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر عبدالله فی لوح قدس رفیعا لیستانس به فی ایامه و یقرئه فی کل صباح و عشیا
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
